file_insights.changes_summary: Added debounce protection mechanism to prevent double-scans
key_additions: Debounce validation logic in scan handler
key_removals: Comment indicating debouncing would be added in next subtask

patterns_discovered.context: Prevents rapid duplicate barcode scans from hardware

patterns_discovered.implementation: Update timestamp BEFORE emitting event to SharedFlow
patterns_discovered.context: Ensures concurrent scans are properly sequenced

patterns_discovered.implementation: Log both accepted and rejected scans with timing info
patterns_discovered.context: Enables debugging and monitoring of debounce effectiveness

gotchas_discovered.impact: First scan always passes debounce check
gotchas_discovered.handling: Intentional - allows immediate first scan without delay

gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents race conditions with concurrent scans
gotchas_discovered.handling: Implemented by updating lastScanTimestamp before launch{} block

gotchas_discovered.consideration: May need adjustment based on actual hardware behavior

approach_outcome.test_coverage: Logic verified through logging and comment documentation

recommendations.recommendation: Consider making DEBOUNCE_DELAY_MS configurable via dependency injection or SharedPreferences for runtime tuning
Add metrics counter for debounced scans to monitor hardware behavior and adjust interval if needed
Implement unit test to verify debounce logic with mocked System.currentTimeMillis()
Consider adding comments explaining why 300ms was chosen and when adjustment might be needed
